a.xlink:title: Defines the 8-bit red, green, and blue (RGB) pixel type in the fl namespace.
Alignment macros and utilities for FastLED.
Unsigned alpha types with UNORM semantics (GPU industry standard).
Legacy compatibility header for 8-bit scaling functions.
Wrapper definitions to allow seamless use of PROGMEM in environments that have it.
Contains definitions that can be used to configure FastLED at compile time.
